name: Norwegian Sardine Pate
recipeIngredient: 2 cans 3 1/4 oz boneless skinless sardines, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese, salt, lemon juice, and freshly ground black pepper.
2. Mash the sardines and beat them into the cheese mixture with chopped parsley and hot pepper sauce.
3. Form the mixture into a mound or desired shape.
4. Garnish with capers and additional chopped parsley.
5. Serve with toast points, bread, or crackers. Makes 2 cups.
